docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. SERVED MAR-03-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIETTER, CRAIG D.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIETTER, CRAIG D. $4,624.29 PRINCIPAL, $287.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,911.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
